mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_login_log ( user_id, username, real_name, login_type, login_ip, login_location, user_agent, browser, os, login_status, fail_reason, login_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{realName}, #{loginType}, #{loginIp}, #{loginLocation}, #{userAgent}, #{browser}, #{os}, #{loginStatus}, #{failReason}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( module_name, biz_type, biz_id, operation_type, request_uri, request_method, request_params, operator_id, operator_name, operator_ip, result_status, error_message, created_at ) VALUES ( #{moduleName}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{operationType}, #{requestUri}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{operatorIp}, #{resultStatus}, #{errorMessage}, NOW() )
